prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约14477名→19110名→20366名→23677名→22130名，整体呈后移趋势，2021至2024年累计后移约9200名，2025年较2024年小幅前移约1547名，出现企稳回升迹象；2021–2023年（理科）计划30人，2024年（物理类）扩至60人，2025年维持60人；2026年计划仍为60人，与2025年持平，未产生额外竞争压力变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第162名持续上升至2026年第134名，排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降），2023年偏正面（食堂服务好、投诉处理及时）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为一般，无明显热度助推或负面舆情；2022年投档线异常信号为中关注（投档线从2018年起逐年下降），但2023年后未见新增异常信号；畜牧学获评A（全国前列），作物学获评A-，农林学科特色鲜明，与学校办学定位一致，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 农林类专业社会热度整体平稳；黑龙江省2026年物理类考生约11.4万人，较2025年（11.7万人）小幅减少约3%，竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年已出现企稳回升、招生计划持平、学校软科排名持续上升、本省考生总数小幅减少等因素，预计2026年报考热度略有回升，位次在2025年基准22130名基础上小幅前移；预测最低位次约22080名，区间21580–22580名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（21580–22580名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如21000名以内）可重点冲刺数据科学与大数据技术、金融学等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（22500名以外）应以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 14477 → 19110 → 20366 → 23677 → 22130, showing an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative backward shift was about 9200 places, while in 2025, there was a slight forward shift of about 1547 places compared to 2024, indicating signs of stabilization and recovery. From 2021 to 2023 (Science category), the enrollment plan was 30 students; in 2024 (Physics category), it expanded to 60 students, and in 2025, it remained at 60 students. The 2026 plan is still 60 students, unchanged from 2025, resulting in no additional competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2022, its reputation was neutral/mixed (admission scores declining year by year), while in 2023, it was slightly positive (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling). Its Douyin popularity ranks 86th overall, rated as average, with no significant popularity boost or negative public opinion. In 2022, the admission score anomaly signal was medium concern (admission scores declining since 2018), but no new anomaly signals appeared after 2023. Animal Science is rated A (top in the country), Crop Science is rated A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry disciplines consistent with the university's positioning, providing certain support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of agriculture and forestry majors remains stable. In 2026, the number of Physics category candidates in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 114,000, a slight decrease of about 3% compared to 2025 (117,000), leading to a slight easing of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stabilization and recovery of historical rankings in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and a slight decrease in the number of provincial candidates, it is expected that application popularity will slightly increase in 2026, with the ranking moving slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 22130. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22080, with a range of 21580–22580.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (21580–22580), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Finance. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 22500), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
